_datasheet_peak_flops_tf_note: Wave 20 (feedback #2): vendor datasheet dense Tensor-Core peaks, for implied-MFU reporting ONLY. The roofline model must keep using peak_flops_tf. On NVIDIA parts peak_flops_tf is ~half of these (see _peak_flops_tf_convention); on TPU/Trainium the two coincide.
fused_attention_kernel: NKI fused attention v3 + FA3 port

interconnect.topology: 32 chips per Trn3 instance, 128 per UltraServer

notes.source: public_estimate; Trainium 3 announced 2024 with 2026+ availability — numbers extrapolated from Trn2 × ~2 scaling factor
notes.compute_units_note: Trn3 doubles NeuronCore count to 16; NCv4 is the rumored successor architecture
notes.hbm_bw_source: AWS public roadmap: HBM3e-class bandwidth (~6 TB/s+)
notes.mxfp4_note: Trn3 expected to add MX-format support per AWS NKI-3 docs hints
notes.topology_note: NeuronLink-v4 doubles intra-node bandwidth; UltraServer scales to 128 chips
